calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Lee.
Curtis Dowling, Esq. for Plaintiff: Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Barbara Leahy, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Jerry Canterbury (defaulted), and Samantha Balwin (claimed of right to possession and answered).
Exhibit 1 - Residential Lease Agreement-------------------ID/EVID
Exhibit 2 - Three-day Notice, dtd 7-19-06-----------------ID/EVID
After hearing the tetimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendants: Jerry Canterbury and Samantha Baldwin as follows:
Restitution and Possession of the property located at 421 Leavenworth St., #23, San Francisco.
The Lease is forfeited.
Back-Rent and Damages $1,935.50
Costs $195.00, for a total of $2,130.50
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JAK MARQUEZ FOR PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY CHARLES MIDDLEKAUFF FOR DEFENDANT SAMANTHA BALDWIN
DEFAULT DEFENDANT JERRY CANTERBURY ALSO PRESENT

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. DEFENDANT BALDWIN LEFT BEFORE SETTLEMENT COMPLETE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS

JUDGE PRO TEM:ANTOINETTE YOUNG ; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
